# AoE2.ai — Full Documentation for AI Models

> AI-powered tools and assistant for Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition players.

## Overview

AoE2.ai (https://aoe2.ai) is a free, community-driven web portal that uses AI to help Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition players improve their game. Available in English and Spanish.

## Pages and Features

### AI Agent (/en/agent, /es/agent)
A conversational AI assistant with deep knowledge of AoE2. Users can ask about:
- Civilization strengths, weaknesses, and matchups
- Unit compositions and counter strategies
- Build orders and timings for different maps and ELO ranges
- Recent patch changes and meta shifts (via web search)
- Player statistics and tournament results (via tools)

The agent uses function calling to access:
- Player profile lookups (from aoe2companion.com and Relic API)
- Civilization tech tree data
- Civilization comparison tools
- Tournament data from Liquipedia
- Web search for up-to-date information

### Live Scout (/en/live, /es/live)
Opponent scouting tool. Users search for a player by name or profile ID and receive:
- Player profile: name, country, rating, rank, win/loss, streak
- Civilization preferences: most-played civs with win rates
- Map preferences: most-played maps with win rates
- Recent match form: last 10 match results
- AI-powered tactical analysis: exploitable habits, timing windows, counter-strategies
- Follow-up AI chat for deeper questions about the opponent

### Replay Analyzer (/en/replay, /es/replay)
Upload .aoe2record replay files for detailed analysis:
- Match overview: map, duration, players, civilizations, winner
- Age-up timings (Feudal, Castle, Imperial) per player
- Battle timeline with locations and casualties
- Army composition breakdown (units trained, buildings placed)
- eAPM (effective Actions Per Minute) per player
- Map control heatmap visualization
- AI-generated match chronicle: turning points, mistakes, strong decisions, improvement tips
- Follow-up AI chat for deeper questions about the replay

### Tech Tree (/en/techtree, /es/techtree)
Interactive civilization tech tree browser:
- Browse all 45+ civilizations
- View unique units, unique techs, and bonuses
- Compare two civilizations side-by-side
- See available units, technologies, and buildings per civ
- Data sourced from the game's actual tech tree files

### Players (/en/players, /es/players)
Player leaderboard and profile viewer:
- Browse ranked leaderboards: RM 1v1, RM Team, EW 1v1, EW Team
- Search players by name (fuzzy matching with variants)
- View individual player profiles with ratings across all modes
- Recent match history with details

### Tournaments (/en/tournaments, /es/tournaments)
Tournament tracker sourcing data from Liquipedia:
- Ongoing, upcoming, and completed tournaments
- Prize pool, dates, tier, and direct Liquipedia links

### Build Orders (/en/learn, /es/learn)
Curated build order guides for learning standard AoE2 strategies.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js (App Router, standalone output)
- AI powered by OpenAI (gpt-5.4-mini) via the Responses API
- Streaming responses with real-time tool activity visualization
- Internationalized: full English and Spanish support
- Authentication via NextAuth.js (Google and Discord providers)
- Hosted on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy and Cloudflare CDN
- Domain: aoe2.ai

## Data Sources

- Player data: aoe2companion.com API and Relic/World's Edge API
- Tech tree data: AoE2 game data files (halfon.aoe2techtree.org)
- Tournament data: Liquipedia Age of Empires wiki
- Web search: OpenAI web_search_preview tool for current information

## API Endpoints

All API endpoints are rate-limited and intended for internal use:
- GET /api/players — Leaderboard data and player search
- GET /api/live — Opponent scouting reports
- GET /api/techtree — Civilization tech tree data
- GET /api/tournaments — Tournament listings
- POST /api/replay — Replay file analysis
- POST /api/agent — AI chat (requires authentication)
